---
name: New Normative Request
about: Request support for a new regulatory normative
title: "[NORMATIVE] "
labels: normative, enhancement
assignees: rfranca777
---

## Normative Details

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | e.g. `PDPL` |
| **Full Name** | e.g. `Personal Data Protection Law` |
| **Country / Region** | e.g. Saudi Arabia / Middle East |
| **Obligation** | Mandatory / Recommended |
| **Area** | e.g. Data Protection |

## Official Reference
Link to the official regulation or documentation:

## Recommended File Naming Pattern
Describe or provide the file naming pattern required by this normative.

**Pattern template** (using FreeNameConvention tokens):
```
{TEXT}-{DATE:YYYY-MM-DD}.pdf
```

**Example file name**:
```
PDPL-DataReport-2026-03-03.pdf
```

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information.
